title: Canadian Frittata with Floral Notes
description: A savory, slightly sweet frittata filled with the flavors of Canada. Perfect for a quick breakfast or brunch.

ingredients.name: floral
ingredients.notes: such as dandelion, clover, and calendula

instructions: Cook the diced bacon in a skillet over medium heat until crispy.
Add the diced onion to the skillet and cook until softened.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs and a pinch of salt.
Add the chopped wildflowers to the bowl and stir to combine.
Pour the egg mixture over the cooked bacon and onion in the skillet.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the eggs are set.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Use a spatula to loosen the edges of the frittata from the skillet.
Slide the frittata out of the skillet onto a plate and serve hot.
Garnish with additional chopped wildflowers, if desired.
